title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Paytm - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Paytm - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
